name: Dumbbell Hammer Grip Incline Bench Row
aliases: Dumbbell Hammer Grip Incline Bench Row
dumbbell reverse grip incline bench one arm row
shortDescription: A back-focused row performed chest-down on an incline bench with dumbbells and a neutral (hammer) grip.
instructions: Lie face down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, neutral grip. Row the weights up toward your hips, squeezing your lats, then lower with control.
steps: Set an incline bench to 30-45 degrees and lie facedown with dumbbells.
Hold the dumbbells with palms facing each other (neutral/hammer grip).
Pull the dumbbells up toward your hips, elbows close to your body.
Pause and contract your back muscles at the top.
Lower the weights slowly with control.
breathing: Exhale pulling up, inhale lowering down.
